required_shape.ddl: CREATE INDEX idx ON documents USING HNSW (embedding vector_l2sq_ops) WITH (dimension = ?, m = ?, ef_construction = ?, quantization = 'f32')
required_shape.query: SELECT id FROM VECTOR_SEARCH(INDEX idx, target_vector => ?, top_k => ?, ef_search => ?)

policy: No Firebolt vector-search benchmark claim exists until local Firebolt Core Docker emits measured VECTOR_SEARCH samples from reproducible inputs.
